namespace = my_mod

# A string with braces "{" and a comment with } must not break depth tracking

my_mod.0001 = {
	type = character_event
	title = my_mod.0001.t
	desc = my_mod.0001.desc
	theme = marriage

	option = {
		name = my_mod.0001.a
		my_mod_marriage_effect = yes
	}
}

my_mod.0002 = {
	hidden = yes
	immediate = {
		add_gold = 10
	}
}
